transcript.clean_text: some major players are missing this Wednesday on the 81st flesh won between B and the M Julian laip second here the last two years and the last nons spaner to took the race Philip jilber don't participate this year while four-time winner and triple title holder Alejandro valde again appears as the great favorite before the final three passages on the M we the last one being decisive with a slight altitude finish six men decide to try and break away on the first flatter part of the track and dub Bago gimo Pearson pet and Pardini take a lead of up to six minutes meanwhile the pelaton is led by two teams loto saal and Alejandro Val's teammates from M Star when it comes to the first passage at the MWI the lead has dwindled to slightly over a minute and the Escape group seems doomed soon after they are reeled in by the pelaton and it's Alexandro de Mari who takes the lead at the second passage on the M Wei only the Luxembourg Champion Bob jungles follows and catches up to him 25 km before arrival the two men collaborate but bjal shows more resources and takes off 11 km before the Finish Line to try a solo run 7 km before arrival Jos precedes the main pack by 50 seconds he passes the cot to Shava and is still in the lead on the final Ascent but 500 M before the Finish Line the pack irresistibly catches up to jles and the Victory will be decided amongst the favorites by Verde seems to have some resources left the Frenchman godu from fdg attacks 200 M before arrival but won't be able to resist Val who confirms his great shape and is once again Victorious at the he takes this classic race for the fifth time ahead of Dan Martin and Dyan TS a man for history Alejandro valde has once again proven to be irresistible at the M after his teammates from M Star controlled the race cleverly the man from Mercia left everyone behind on the final 10% climb and takes a fifth Victory on this classic race no one has won here more often one week before his 37th birthday it's already the 10th success this season for the Spanish Veteran no me no I wasn't afraid but I had a lot of respect for my competitors they were very strong but I felt in great shape today and I had to take advantage of this it's the sixth Spanish success in a row on the flesh won Outsider Den Martin finishes second he's on the podium for the third time in four years while the Belgian Dylan TOS from BMC finishes third his biggest success on the classic race so far it's Anna V Brean who takes a third title in a row on the women's race the Olympic champion finishes solo ahead of her bill stoneman's teammate the British Elizabeth denan the Dutch recent winner of the Amel gold race is now only two victories short of equaling her compatriot Marian fos five-time winner at the M wi the Shand de Chappelle the true name of the wall of Wei has spoken and even though this does not guarantee a good performance on Le Baston Le it's a great indicator for the oldest and biggest of the spring Classics on Sunday more action awaits Us in the ORD dance
